sentence: 这家平台吸引了很多大品牌广告主。
pinyin: Zhè jiā píngtái xīyǐn le hěn duō dà pǐnpái guǎng gào zhǔ.
english: This platform has attracted many major brand advertisers.

sentence: 老师发了一份课程纲要给我们。
pinyin: Lǎo shī fā le yī fèn kè chéng gāng yào gěi wǒ men.
english: The teacher handed out a course outline to us.

sentence: 他们两个合伙开了一家咖啡店。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè héhuǒ kāi le yī jiā kāfēidiàn.
english: The two of them partnered up to open a coffee shop.

sentence: 这次发射是航天史上的里程碑。
pinyin: Zhè cì fāshè shì hángtiān shǐ shàng de lǐchéngbēi.
english: This launch is a milestone in the history of space exploration.

sentence: 她用面粉和鸡蛋做了一个蛋糕。
pinyin: Tā yòng miànfěn hé jīdàn zuò le yī gè dàngāo.
english: She made a cake using flour and eggs.
